text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha! Trying to place an edict on<n>this
academy's nightingale, I see.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I swear, you too are simply making a<n>mountain out
of a molehill. Pain, no<n>matter the type, is trivial for
the<n>Overlord.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes... Be it a gash from a frigid blade<n>of ice or a
searing wound from a<n>raging fire!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! But I will not kneel. My<n>determination shall
be known! In fact,<n>I could convey it through
operatic<n>expression this very moment!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That's it! We will dance! Now is the<n>time to
compose a new ballad!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My courage in the face of hardship<n>will lift the
spirits of all—my own too,<n>of course.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This pain shall become my strength.<n>Trainer, let us
go to the dance studio<n>posthaste!
choice_data_list: ...All right, let's give it a go!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This pain shall become my strength.<n>Trainer, let us
go to the dance studio<n>posthaste!
choice_data_list: ...All right, let's give it a go!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Are you telling me my efforts to<n>encourage will
only elicit tears of<n>despair?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Sigh... If you say so, I must holdback. After all, the Overlord must onlyinspire joy.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
While unfortunate, relenting appears<n>to be best. I
shall review past scripts<n>in the meantime.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A crestfallen T.M. Opera O lies down<n>in bed... and
focuses on her recovery.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I don't understand her reasoning, but<n>if she's this
motivated, I'll take the<n>chance!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This swan spreads her injured wings<n>in search of
the heavens. If she<n>cannot take to the skies, then
she<n>must dance.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Laaa-di-da-di-daaa! ♪Dooo-di-do-di...<n>Ack?!
choice_data_list: Whoa! Did you twist your ankle?!
Whoa! Did you twist your ankle?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Strength is a double-edged sword...<n>But that is but
another aspect... of<n>beauty.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With a careless twirl, she twists her<n>ankle and
collapses in pain. We take<n>the time necessary for
her to recover.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hum-di-duuum ♪ Mm-mm-hmmm ♪

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
...Perfect! The strength and grace of a<n>swan taking
to the sky is embodied<n>through these movements!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well? Did I appear injured to you<n>during my
opera?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe... Haaah ha ha! Stand back<n>and observe,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
For this moment marks the birth of<n>my magnum
opus!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Having saw no signs of an injury<n>during her
dance, we start training<n>again right after!
